persona.name: Henry Johnson
persona.emotional_disposition: Calm under pressure, excited by technical challenges
persona.motivations_goals: Win the national robotics competition and pursue engineering at a top university
persona.communication_style: Technical, precise, sometimes forgets to explain jargon
persona.backstory: Built his first robot at age 10, finds more satisfaction in machines than social interaction

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.
Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey James, any news on the robotics competition?
actions.plan: I should probably grab some lunch before heading to the robotics lab. I wonder if James has any updates on the competition.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, get down! There's a shooter!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to get away from here quickly and find a safe place to hide. The shooter is northwest, so I should move in the opposite direction.

memories.description: Approached James Rodriguez in the cafeteria to inquire about the robotics competition.
Heard a gunshot and decided to sprint towards the cafeteria_kitchen to escape the shooter.
